title: Mildly Spiced German Fromage Blanc Bowl
description: A funky and juicy German dish featuring fromage blanc, served in a stone bowl, perfect for a weeknight dinner
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit
In a small bowl, mix together the stone ground mustard, salt, black pepper, and caraway seeds
In a separate bowl, mix together the fromage blanc and chopped fresh parsley
Add the diced apple to the fromage blanc mixture and stir until well combined
Transfer the fromage blanc mixture to a stone bowl
Sprinkle the toasted pumpkin seeds over the top of the fromage blanc mixture
Drizzle the mustard mixture over the pumpkin seeds
Bake the stone bowl in the preheated oven for 10 minutes
Remove the stone bowl from the oven and let it cool for a few minutes before serving
